title: Child Sexual Abuse: MedlinePlus
content: Child Sexual Abuse On this page Basics Summary Start Here Learn More Living With See, Play and Learn No links available Research Statistics and Research Journal Articles Resources Find an Expert For You Children Patient Handouts Summary Sexual abuse is one form of child abuse . It includes a wide range of actions between a child and an adult or older child. Often these involve body contact, but not always. Exposing one's genitals to children or pressuring them for sex is sexual abuse. Using a child for pornography is also sexual abuse. Most sexual abusers know the child they abuse. They may be family friends, neighbors or babysitters. About one-third of abusers are related to the child. Most abusers are men. If you think a child may have been abused, it's important to report it.
